steps.title: Area Formula for a Rectangle
steps.content: The area of a rectangle equals length times width: $$A = l \cdot w = 3 \cdot 39$$

steps.title: Evaluate Each Choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — '2(3+39)': This computes 2(42) = 84, which is the perimeter formula 2(l+w), not area. ✗
  • Choice B — '2(3·39)': This doubles the area to get 234, which is twice what we want. ✗
  • Choice C — '3+39': This adds the dimensions to get 42, the sum, not the product. ✗
  • Choice D — '3·39': This is exactly length times width = 117 square units, the area. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
